hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
set -uo pipefail
FAILED=0
OUTPUT=""

has_script() { node -e "process.exit(require('./package.json').scripts?.['$1']?0:1)" 2>/dev/null; }

run_check() {
  local name="$1"
  shift
  local result
  if result=$("$@" 2>&1); then
    echo "✅ $name passed" >&2
  else
    FAILED=1
    OUTPUT="$OUTPUT\n\n❌ $name FAILED:\n$result"
    echo "❌ $name failed" >&2
  fi
}

run_check "format" pnpm format
run_check "lint" npx @biomejs/biome check --error-on-warnings
if has_script typecheck; then run_check "typecheck" env SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION=true pnpm typecheck; fi
if has_script knip; then run_check "knip" pnpm knip; fi
if has_script test; then run_check "test" env SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION=true pnpm test; fi

if [ $FAILED -ne 0 ]; then
  echo "" >&2
  echo "=== ERRORS TO FIX ===" >&2
  echo -e "$OUTPUT" >&2
  exit 2
fi
echo "All checks passed." >&2
